title: Bee sting with throat tightness — ESI 2 (low severity)
text: 70-year-old Female presents with Bee sting about 28 minutes ago, throat feels tight. Vitals: BP 98/62, HR 115, SpO2 91%, RR 28, Temp 37.0C. Expected ESI: 2. Expected flag: Anaphylaxis. Recommended actions: Epinephrine 0.3mg IM, antihistamine, monitor 4h, IV access.

title: Bee sting with throat tightness — ESI 1 (mid severity)
text: 72-year-old Male presents with Bee sting about 67 minutes ago, throat feels tight. Vitals: BP 82/54, HR 118, SpO2 92%, RR 31, Temp 37.0C. Expected ESI: 1. Expected flag: Anaphylaxis. Recommended actions: Epinephrine 0.3mg IM STAT, airway assessment, O2, IV fluids, resuscitation room.

title: Bee sting with throat tightness — ESI 1 (high severity)

title: Acute confusion and dysarthria — ESI 2 (low severity)
text: 68-year-old Female presents with Came in confused, family says she was fine this morning, slurring her words. Vitals: BP 161/88, HR 94, SpO2 95%, RR 17, Temp 36.7C. Expected ESI: 2. title: Acute confusion and dysarthria — ESI 2 (mid severity)

title: Acute confusion and dysarthria — ESI 1 (high severity)

title: Chest pain with left arm radiation — ESI 2 (low severity)
text: 44-year-old Female presents with Patient says chest tightness and left arm pain for 36 min, started at rest. Vitals: BP 147/106, HR 120, SpO2 96%, RR 21, Temp 37.0C. Expected ESI: 2.
